stem: Which guideline number deals with the Guidelines on Structured Deposits?
explanation: FAA-G09 是结构性存款指引。FAA-G10 是转换、FSG-G04 是公平交易、FAA-G14 是平衡计分卡。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Guide Part I Ch.9 — chapter outline

stem: Under FAA-G09, advice on a structured deposit is NOT covered by the Guidelines when it is given to:

options.B: An accredited, expert or institutional investor as defined in Regulation 2(1) of the FAR
options.C: A customer who declines a fact-find
options.D: Any customer of a deposit-taking institution

explanation: 第1.1段:指引不适用于向认可投资者、专家投资者或机构投资者(FAR 第2(1)条定义)提供意见的情形。其余客户仍受指引规管。

stem: According to FAA-G09, the principal sum of a structured deposit is guaranteed only if the deposit is:
explanation: 第1.10(f)段:本金仅在持有至到期时才获保证;提前提取可能损失本金。结构性存款不受存款保险(Cap.77B)承保,故 D 错。

stem: When a client does not require any recommendation on a structured deposit and the usual fact-find is dispensed with, FAA-G09 requires that the warning given to the client be:

options.A: Given verbally only and need not be recorded
options.B: Sent only if the client later complains
options.C: In writing, prominent and clear, and documented as read and understood
options.D: Replaced by a higher commission disclosure

explanation: 第1.14–1.15段:警示须以书面、显著、清晰方式作出,并记录客户已阅读理解后仍愿继续。

stem: Under FAA-G09, an FA that is also a deposit-taking institution should ensure that:

options.A: Bank tellers actively cross-sell structured deposits to depositors
options.B: The marketing/advisory process for structured deposits is distinct from the deposit-acceptance process
options.C: All structured deposits are sold only online
options.D: Structured deposits are marketed as identical to fixed deposits

explanation: 第1.21–1.22段:为区分结构性存款与传统定期存款,营销/咨询流程须与收存款流程区分;不合资格的存款区员工(如柜员)不得参与营销或建议,故 A 错;不可误导客户认为与定期存款相同,故 D 错。

stem: Under FAA-G10, "switching" is best described as a situation where a client:

options.A: Renews a fixed deposit at the same bank
options.B: Disposes of or reduces interest in one investment product to acquire or increase interest in another
options.D: Updates personal particulars in a fact-find

explanation: 第1.4段:"转换"包括客户处置或减持某产品的全部或部分,以取得或增持另一产品。

stem: When reviewing whether a recommended switch is appropriate under FAA-G10 (per paragraph 42 of FAA-N16), which of the following is NOT one of the factors the supervisor must consider?

options.A: Whether the client suffers a penalty for terminating the original product
options.B: Whether the client incurs transaction costs without gaining any real benefit
options.C: Whether the replacement product is less suitable for the client
options.D: Whether the representative will earn a higher commission from the switch

explanation: 第1.13段列出四项因素:终止罚则、无实益的交易成本、更高/相同成本但更低利益(或更高成本相同利益)、替代产品是否更不适合。代表佣金高低不在列,故 D 是正确答案(即不属考量因素)。

stem: FAA-G10 notes that a remuneration structure based solely on sales volume may:

options.A: Encourage product pushing and undesirable switching
options.B: Eliminate the need for supervisor review

explanation: 第1.17段:仅以销售量为基础的薪酬可能鼓励产品推销与不当转换;财务顾问应使薪酬结构维护代表提供优质专业建议的责任。

stem: Which of the following correctly states a fair dealing outcome under FSG-G04?

options.A: Outcome Three: Financial institutions maximise shareholder returns
options.B: Outcome Three: Customers are served by competent representatives
options.C: Outcome Three: Customers receive the lowest possible fees
options.D: Outcome Three: Representatives meet fixed sales quotas

explanation: 第1.3段:成果三为"客户由有能力的代表服务"。五项成果为文化、产品适合性、代表能力、信息清晰、投诉处理。

stem: Under FSG-G04, when deciding whether to distribute a new financial product, a financial institution should:

options.A: Rely solely on the product provider's assessment of suitability
options.B: Distribute to all customer segments to maximise reach
options.C: Conduct its own formal due diligence and form an independent conclusion on suitability
options.D: Skip due diligence if the provider is reputable

explanation: 第3.18、3.22段:金融机构须自行进行正式产品尽职调查,识别适合与明显不适合的客户群,且不应仅依赖产品提供方的评估。

stem: Under FSG-G04, the principle of utmost good faith (uberrima fides) means that for an insurance contract:

options.A: Only the insurer must disclose material facts
options.B: The customer must disclose all material facts, failing which the policy may be voided
options.C: Caveat emptor fully applies and no disclosure is required
options.D: Material non-disclosure has no consequence after the policy is issued

explanation: 第3.62段脚注:保险合约属最大诚信(uberrima fides)的特殊合约,有别于一般"buyers beware"(caveat emptor)。客户须披露所有重要事实,重大不实披露可导致保单被作废。

stem: Under FSG-G04 (Outcome Five), which dispute resolution avenue should customers be made aware of when they cannot resolve a dispute directly with the financial institution?

options.B: The Monetary Authority of Singapore directly
options.C: The Financial Industry Disputes Resolution Centre Ltd (FIDReC)

explanation: 第3.80段:客户应先向金融机构寻求解决,但应被告知可向 FIDReC 求助,这可纳入新客户的入职流程。

stem: Under FAA-G14, a client is a "selected client" if the client meets any TWO of the following criteria. Which set correctly states the criteria?

options.A: Aged 62 or older; not proficient in spoken or written English; below GCE 'O'/'N' level or equivalent
options.B: Aged 55 or older; unemployed; no prior investments
options.C: Aged 65 or older; a CPF member; holds a structured deposit
options.D: Aged 60 or older; non-resident; low income

explanation: 第4段定义:选定客户须符合以下任两项:(a)62岁或以上;(b)口语或书面英语不熟练;(c)低于 GCE 'O' 或 'N' 水准或同等学历(已书面评估具足够投资经验知识者除外)。

stem: Under FAA-G14, the close supervision of a representative assigned a balanced scorecard grade of "E" should include having the supervisor accompany the representative for a minimum of:
explanation: 第16(a)段:主管须陪同"E"代表进行至少5笔成交销售(closed sales);此外 ISA 单位须对其每笔交易进行至少3个月的全面独立交易后核查。

stem: Under FAA-G14, when an FA conducts a reference check on someone it intends to recruit who was previously a representative or supervisor at other FAs, it should request:

options.A: The last four balanced scorecard grades assigned by previous principal(s) within the past 10 years
options.B: Only the most recent balanced scorecard grade
options.C: All grades over the past 30 years
options.D: No grades, as these are confidential

explanation: 第21段:进行背景核查时,应向其前principal索取过去10年内分配给该人的最近四个平衡计分卡等级;收到核查请求的财务顾问亦应披露其曾给该人的等级。

stem: Under FAA-G14, if an investment product is found to be unsuitable for a client during pre-transaction checks, the FA should:

options.A: Proceed with the transaction and note the issue for the next quarter
options.B: Allow the client to modify or cancel the transaction without bearing any value difference or cancellation/modification fees
options.C: Charge the client a penalty for the supervisor's time

explanation: 第31段:若交易前核查发现产品不适合客户,财务顾问应允许受影响客户选择修改或取消交易,且不得要求其承担产品价值差额及任何相关取消或修改费用;并应按要求提供新建议。
